name: Creamy Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour three nine-inch round pans if desired. Mix the flour with baking powder and salt.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until light. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Continue beating until fluffy, about two minutes.
3. Alternate beating in flour mixture (in fourths) with milk (in thirds), beginning and ending with the flour mix. Add vanilla. Beat until just smooth, about one minute.
4. Pour batter into prepared pans and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until surface springs back when lightly touched. Cool pans on wire racks for ten minutes, then remove cakes and cool thoroughly.
5. Prepare filling: whip cream, adding sugar and vanilla, keeping it cool until the cake is completely cooled.
6. Make frosting by whipping cream cheese and sugar (both should be soft) together, then add vanilla. Add a little milk if needed to reach desired consistency.
7. Assemble the cake: place one layer on serving plate with top side down, fill with whipped cream filling, sprinkle with coconut and chopped walnuts if desired. Repeat with second layer, then place top layer on. Frost sides and top, covering entire cake with coconut and adding chopped walnuts if desired. Refrigerate to set frosting.
8. Use skewers to hold the cake in place while frosting if needed.
